# zstack_zone (Resource)

Manage ZStack zones. A zone is a logical grouping of resources such as clusters, hosts, and primary storage.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the zone.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the zone.
- `state` (String) The state of the zone (Enabled, Disabled).

### Read-Only

- `type` (String) The type of the zone.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the zone.
